mapper.insert: insert into Vote(activity_id, activity_voter_id, activity_candidate_id, result, round_no, created_at) values(#{activityId}, #{activityVoterId}, #{activityCandidateId}, #{result}, #{roundNo}, sysdate())

insert into Vote(activity_id, activity_voter_id, activity_candidate_id, result, round_no, created_at) values
(#{item.activityId}, #{item.activityVoterId}, #{item.activityCandidateId}, #{item.result}, #{item.roundNo}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select activity_candidate_id, result, count(1) as vote_count from Vote where activity_id = #{activityId} and round_no = 1 group by activity_candidate_id, result

select v.id, v.activity_id, v.activity_voter_id, v.activity_candidate_id, v.result, v.round_no, v.created_at, av.name as voter_name, av.employee_id as voter_employee_id, av.import_seq as voter_import_seq, av.department as voter_department, ac.import_seq, ac.name as candidate_name, ac.company, ac.department, ac.third_level_department, ac.position, ac.applied_level, ac.fixed_type from Vote v inner join ActivityVoter av on av.id = v.activity_voter_id inner join ActivityCandidate ac on ac.id = v.activity_candidate_id where v.activity_id = #{activityId} and v.round_no = 1 order by case av.department when '船体组' then 1 when '船机组' then 2 when '船电组' then 3 when '综合组' then 4 else 99 end asc, av.department asc, av.import_seq asc, av.id asc, case ac.applied_level when '副高级工程师' then 2 when '副高级' then 2 when '高级工程师' then 2 when '高级' then 2 when '中级工程师' then 3 when '中级' then 3 when '工程师' then 3 when '助理工程师' then 4 when '助理级' then 4 when '助理' then 4 when '初级' then 4 when '技术员' then 5 when '员级' then 5 else 99 end asc, ac.applied_level asc, ac.import_seq asc, ac.id asc
